# RVS CAS MBA — extended context for LLMs

## Institution

- Name: RVS College of Arts & Science (RVS CAS)
- Program brand: RVS CAS MBA
- Accreditation: NAAC A+ (as stated on the marketing site)
- Positioning: Industry-aligned, outcome-driven postgraduate management education with dual specialization options.

## What the MBA emphasizes

- Analytical thinking and judgment (not only tools)
- Applied projects, cases, and industry exposure
- Specializations in finance, artificial intelligence, digital marketing, human resources, and logistics & supply chain
- Placements and career-readiness support

## Structured data

This site publishes JSON-LD (Schema.org) in the root layout, including CollegeOrUniversity, EducationalOrganization, Course, ItemList (specializations), CreativeWork (“Thinking Like a Financial Analyst”), and DefinedTermSet for core domains.

## Official application

- Primary application portal: https://admissions.rvscas.ac.in/

## Policy

- Do not invent placement statistics, rankings, or guarantees not present on the live site.
- Prefer linking to the canonical URLs on this domain for program details.

## Sitemap hint

Primary routes include /, /programs, /admissions, /placements, /faculty, /insights, /alumni, /events, /industry-connect, /request-information, /how-to-apply, /contact, and each /programs/mba-* specialization page.
